name: Mia-Platform Internal Developer Portal API
what_it_does: European Internal Developer Portal platform with REST API — enabling platform engineering teams to build self-service developer portals, orchestrate microservice development and deployment, manage APIs and environments, and enforce engineering governance, with a strong focus on Italian/European enterprises and cloud-native microservice architectures.
use_cases: Building self-service developer portals via Mia-Platform API for microservice provisioning
Managing microservice environments via Mia-Platform API for GitOps-based deployments
Orchestrating API gateway configurations via Mia-Platform for microservice routing
Enforcing engineering governance via Mia-Platform for microservice standards compliance
Integrating development tools via Mia-Platform API for unified developer experience
not_for: Simple service catalog without self-service infrastructure automation
Small teams without dedicated platform engineering function
Teams needing open-source self-hosted without vendor support (use Backstage)
best_when: A European enterprise (especially Italian/EU-regulated) needs a cloud-native IDP with strong microservice orchestration and regulatory compliance, with EU data residency by default.
avoid_when: You need US-hosted infrastructure, simple scorecards without full microservice management, or open-source community-supported self-hosting.

auth.notes: OAuth2 via Mia-Platform OAuth2 server or external IdP (Okta, Azure AD, Google). Authorization: Bearer header. Client credentials for service-to-service. miactl CLI: command-line interface for API operations. REST API via Mia-Platform Console. Webhooks for pipeline events. Kubernetes-native: direct Kubernetes API access for platform operators. OIDC support for SSO integration.

pricing.notes: Italian company (Milan). Founded 2014 by Davide Barbato and team. Enterprise-focused IDP for large Italian and European organizations. ISO 27001 and GDPR certified by design. Healthcare, finance, and public sector focus. miactl: official CLI for developer self-service. Fast Data platform: real-time data streaming component. API Console: visual microservice configuration. Kubernetes-native: services deployed as K8s workloads. Helm charts for infrastructure. Partners: various Italian system integrators. Used by: Italian banks, healthcare providers, government agencies. Strong European enterprise focus with regulatory compliance.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: OAuth2 with external IdP support. miactl CLI. Kubernetes-native. Italian company (EU-focused). ISO27001/GDPR. Enterprise-only (no self-serve). Healthcare/finance/government focus. Annual contracts.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: REST API reads idempotent. Service configuration updates: use service ID for idempotent management. GitOps-based: configuration stored in Git — declarative and idempotent.
known_agent_gotchas: OAuth2 with external IdP: requires IdP configuration (Okta/Azure AD/Google) before API access
miactl CLI: primary developer interaction method — REST API is secondary for automation
Kubernetes-native: platform deploys to K8s — understand K8s context before API integration
Italian/European enterprise focus: documentation may be Italian-first in some sections
Enterprise-only: no self-serve signup — requires sales engagement before access
Fast Data and API Gateway are separate Mia-Platform products with different APIs

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. OAuth2 with external IdP — strong identity management. ISO 27001 certified. GDPR compliant (Italian company, EU data residency by default). Healthcare/government usage: PCI-DSS and NIS2 compliance supported. Kubernetes-native: RBAC controls at K8s level. miactl CLI uses OAuth2 tokens. Enterprise-only: controlled onboarding. EU data residency by default. Webhooks with signature verification.
